jokes.title: Trust issues
jokes.body: Why don't scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything.

jokes.title: High expectations
jokes.body: I told my wife she was drawing her eyebrows too high. She looked surprised.

jokes.title: Road trouble
jokes.body: Why did the bicycle fall over? It was two-tired.

jokes.title: Good read
jokes.body: I'm reading a book about anti-gravity. It's impossible to put down.

jokes.title: Employee of the month
jokes.body: Why did the scarecrow win an award? Because he was outstanding in his field.

jokes.title: Grew on me
jokes.body: I used to hate facial hair. But it grew on me.

jokes.title: Hard crowd
jokes.body: Why don't eggs tell jokes? They'd crack each other up.

jokes.title: Just a little space
jokes.body: Did you hear about the claustrophobic astronaut? He just needed a little space.

jokes.title: Rough morning
jokes.body: Why did the coffee file a police report? It got mugged.

jokes.title: Missing one
jokes.body: I only know 25 letters of the alphabet. I don't know y.

jokes.title: Spelling problem
jokes.body: What do you call a fish without eyes? A fsh.

jokes.title: Work in progress
jokes.body: I have a joke about construction. I'm still working on it.

jokes.title: Technical difficulty
jokes.body: Why do cows wear bells? Because their horns don't work.

jokes.title: Disputed property
jokes.body: What do you call cheese that isn't yours? Nacho cheese.

jokes.title: Strict regimen
jokes.body: I'm on a seafood diet. I see food and I eat it.

jokes.title: Measurements
jokes.body: Why can't a nose be 12 inches long? Because then it'd be a foot.

jokes.title: Brief conversation
jokes.body: What did the ocean say to the beach? Nothing, it just waved.

jokes.title: Prehistoric nap
jokes.body: What do you call a sleeping dinosaur? A dino-snore.

jokes.title: Prepared
jokes.body: Why did the golfer bring two pairs of pants? In case he got a hole in one.

jokes.title: Not who they say
jokes.body: What do you call a fake noodle? An impasta.

jokes.title: Stop at nothing
jokes.body: Did you hear about the mathematician afraid of negative numbers? He'll stop at nothing to avoid them.

jokes.title: Hard to say
jokes.body: Someone stole my mood ring. I don't know how I feel about that.

jokes.title: Late realization
jokes.body: I couldn't figure out why the baseball kept getting bigger. Then it hit me.

jokes.title: Firm stance
jokes.body: My wife told me to stop acting like a flamingo. I had to put my foot down.

jokes.title: Bad material
jokes.body: I would tell a joke about paper, but it's tearable.

jokes.title: Out of business
jokes.body: Why did the gym close down? It just didn't work out.

jokes.title: Dental work
jokes.body: What do you call a bear with no teeth? A gummy bear.

jokes.title: Product recall
jokes.body: What do you call a can opener that doesn't work? A can't opener.

jokes.title: Good book
jokes.body: I'm reading a book about teleportation. It's bound to take me somewhere.

jokes.title: Cardiff traffic report
jokes.body: Traffic was rough this morning. I had to wait on a dog, a mower, and a neighbor wanting to talk.

riddles.question: What runs all through Cardiff but never wears a shoe?
What shows up after a rain, tells the truth, and never says a word?
What belongs to the whole town but gets used one porch at a time?
What gets louder the stiller the woods get?
The more you take, the more you leave behind. What am I?
I speak without a mouth and hear without ears. I have no body but come alive with the wind. What am I?
I'm full of holes but still hold water. What am I?
What is always in front of you but can't be seen?
